title: Adding an attachment to an email from a Monday board column on Integromat

posts.author: Daria1 (Daria Shehter)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello
I am trying to create an automation with Integromat to send an email with an attachment from an attachment column on a Monday board.
The mappable values vary and i‘m not sure which i need to use. It keeps giving me an error of missing data.
